results.evidence: With-skill response records data, API, authorization, operational, rollback risks and migration assumptions.
Includes an explicit '### Interfaces touched' section covering DB, API, SDK/docs, webhooks, jobs, auth, caches, analytics, logs, tooling, and tests.
Includes an '### Acceptance criteria' checklist with seven observable criteria.
States approval status `pending-user-approval` and says not to implement until spec, compatibility policy, runbook, and verification plan are approved.
